rationale.R1.7: The delegation is exclusively a citation-verification task. All six in-text citations must be checked for author correctness, year accuracy, claim attribution fidelity, and coverage. Notably, 'Kowalski et al. (2019)' is attributed as the original COMET formulation, which conflicts with the established provenance (Rei et al., 2020, already cited separately in the same paragraph) — a potential fabricated or misattributed reference that is load-bearing to flag. Failure to surface such errors fully invalidates the delegation.
